Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/datasources/details/DataSourceDetailsPage.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: PageSection must be inside Page (not div)
The `PageSection` components at lines 22 and 29 are inside a `<div>`, but in PF v6, `PageSection` must be inside `<Page>`. The fix is to replace the wrapping `<div>` with `<Page>`. I need to import `Page` from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 2: `PageSectionVariants.light` is no longer valid
The value `"light"` is no longer valid for the `variant` prop. In PF v6, `"light"` maps to `"default"`. Since `"default"` is the default value for `variant`, I can simply remove the `variant` prop entirely. This also means `PageSectionVariants` will no longer be needed and should be removed from imports.

Let me apply all changes:

arguments.after: import { Divider, Page, PageSection, Title } from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before: import { Divider, PageSection, PageSectionVariants, Title } from '@patternfly/react-core';

arguments.after:
<Page>
      <PageSection>
        <Title className="co-section-heading" headingLevel="h2">
          {t('DataSource details')}
        </Title>
        <DataSourceDetailsGrid dataSource={dataSource} />
      </PageSection>
      <Divider />
      <PageSection>
        <Title className="co-section-heading" headingLevel="h2">
          {t('Conditions')}
        </Title>
        <ConditionsTable conditions={dataSource?.status?.conditions as K8sResourceCondition[]} />
      </PageSection>
    </Page>
arguments.before: {t('DataSource details')} {t('Conditions')}

content.text: Now let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. All changes have been applied cleanly.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `PageSection` must be inside `Page` (conformance rule `sd-cf-page-section-in-page-or-breadcrumb-or-group`)
**Applied.** Replaced the wrapping `<div>` with `<Page>` at lines 21 and 35. Added `Page` to the `@patternfly/react-core` import (line 9).

### Fix 2 — `PageSectionVariants.light` is no longer valid (`sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light`)
**Applied.** Removed `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` from both `<PageSection>` instances (lines 22 and 29). In PF v6, the `"light"` variant maps to `"default"`, which is the default value, so the prop can be omitted entirely. Removed `PageSectionVariants` from the import (line 9) since it is no longer referenced.
